log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:9+3=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:16+7=23 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

→ Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:19+7=26 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
